ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Maylender, he delivered to the Fantastici academicians the following two presentations: `Perche` la tramontana non agghiacci il Tevere`, and `Perche` l`Ozio sia nemico dell`Onesta`.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
